paper_focus.title: Evaluation of the density of steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To develop predictive models for the density of steels as a function of chemical composition and phase constitution by combining regression analysis with thermodynamic assessments of carbide phases.
main_process_variables: composition (mass % of C, Cr, Mn, Si, Cu, Mo, V, Ni, Ti, N, Co, Al, etc.)
choice of model (simple cementite assumption vs. thermodynamic equilibrium calculation)
